---
name: Suggest a New Resource
about: Suggest a book, course, tool, or link to be added to the roadmap
title: '[RESOURCE] - Title of the resource'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Resource Name:** 
[e.g. The Pragmatic Engineer Newsletter]

**Link to Resource:**
[e.g. https://blog.pragmaticengineer.com/]

**Which Category does it belong to?**
- [ ] Knowledge & Tech
- [ ] Soft Skills & Mindset
- [ ] Wealth & Investing
- [ ] Health & Biohacking
- [ ] Productivity & Second Brain
- [ ] Personal Branding & Networking
- [ ] Experiences & Expansion

**Why should this be added? (1-2 sentences):**
[Explain why this resource is top 1% and how it aligns with the core philosophy of this repo.]
